DP.359.0000:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record set by a Battle Tower master!\f
Tanya: A Battle Tower master?\f
Serge: You heard right, Tanya!
I’m talking about [0103,0000]’s\r
[0100,0001]-led team.\f
They set a new Single Battle record
of [0135,0002] straight wins at the tower!\f
Tanya: They must really enjoy
climbing to high places.\f
Serge: No, no, you’ve got that all
wrong!\f
They accomplished a super feat!
See you again, folks!
DP.359.0001:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record set by a Battle Tower master!\f
Tanya: A Battle Tower master?\f
Serge: You heard right, Tanya!
I’m talking about [0103,0000]’s\r
[0100,0001]-led team.\f
They set a new Double Battle record
of [0135,0002] straight wins at the tower!\f
Tanya: They must have been scared
of Single Battles.\f
Serge: No, no, that’s not so!
Double Battles are rough, too!\f
They accomplished a super feat!
See you again, folks!
DP.359.0002:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record on Pokémon size. It’s huge!\f
Tanya: This is about a huge
Pokémon?\f
Serge: You said it, Tanya!
The record was set by [0103,0000].\f
[0103,0000]’s [0100,0001] reached
the record size of [0134,0002].[0132,0003] inches!\f
Tanya: That will never fit in the
palms of my hands.\f
Serge: No, no, Tanya, one’d never
fit in your hands either way!\f
[0103,0000] sure set a super record!
See you again, folks!
DP.359.0003:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record set by a slot-game master!\f
Tanya: Ooh! Did the record setter
have lots of SPOINK and GRUMPIG?\f
Serge: Huh? Oh, right! I said slot,
not slop, Tanya!\f
Nope, this is about [0103,0000]’s
big day at the Game Corner.\f
[0103,0000] started out with
[0137,0002] Coins.\f
In [013B,0001] minutes, guess how
many Coins the Trainer ended with?\f
Tanya: The Trainer lost them all?\f
Serge: No, no, no! We wouldn’t be
reporting a tragedy like that!\f
The Trainer started with [0137,0002] Coins
and ended up with [0137,0003] Coins!\f
Tanya: I’m sure that will buy a lot
of slops!\f
Serge: No, no, Tanya, this isn’t
about slops at all!\f
It was a great day at the slots!
See you again, folks!
DP.359.0005:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record set by a Berry master!\f
Tanya: Berries?
Is this a small record?\f
Serge: No, no, Tanya!
This isn’t about size!\f
Nope, this is about [0103,0000]
growing a giant [0108,0001] plant.\f
The Trainer picked an unreal number
of Berries from that plant.\f
Tanya: The Trainer sounds like a real
glutton.\f
Serge: No, no, Tanya!
[0101,0000] isn’t eating the Berries!\f
It’s about how many were picked!
See you again, folks!
DP.359.0007:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at an amazing
record set by a Trap-busting master!\f
Tanya: Ooh! A Trap buster?
Tell me more!\f
Serge: ...Tanya, you seem overly
excited about this...\f
...Anyway, [0103,0000] set an
inspiring record for busting Traps.\f
Tanya: More! Details!
Tell me more!\f
Serge: [0103,0000] disarmed
[0134,0002] Traps, including\r
the [0119,0001]!\f
Tanya: I want to hear more!\f
Serge: ...More? But, how...?\f
Tanya: What were [0103,0000]’s
thoughts while disarming Traps?\f
Serge: How am I supposed to know
something like that...?\f
Tanya: Everyone! Let’s do away with
Traps! Let’s go underground!
DP.359.0008:
Serge: It’s time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Today, we’ll look at a super record
set by a Flag-capturing master!\f
Tanya: Capture the Flag?\f
Serge: You heard right, Tanya!
It’s about getting Flags from Secret\r
Bases underground!\f
In just one session, [0103,0000]
captured [0134,0001] Flags!\f
Tanya: Isn’t that greedy?\f
Serge: No, no, that’s not so!
That’s the way that game’s played!\f
It was a grand undertaking!
See you again, folks!
